title: ADR-0016: Engine distributed tracing & cross-service trace-context propagation (orvex-wiki)
verdict_summary: Canonical, in-force ADR (ratified 2026-07-08, corrected 2026-07-09) — NOT superseded/stub, confirmed live via docmost-cli. All 3 candidate gaps REFUTED on adversarial re-check: the gap-hunt correctly found no wiki plan.json story for these requirements, but wrongly concluded the ENGINE-side build was uncovered. ENG-1599 (engine OTel tracing emission + W3C propagation + pino trace_id/span_id stamping + PII deny-list AC6) and ENG-1600 (outbox traceparent/tracestate/correlation_id columns + relay-restore + producer span) are BOTH status=Done in Linear, with merged PRs (#68, #76) and code live on origin/main (apps/server/src/orvex/obs/**, apps/server/src/orvex/events/outbox/orvex-outbox-trace-context.*, apps/server/src/orvex/attachments/orvex-mask.util.ts) — verified by git log/git ls-tree, not just Linear status. This work shipped as direct Linear issues outside the P1-structure epic/story breakdown, which is why grepping feature-map.txt/plan.json found nothing; it is not unbuilt. The one remaining genuinely-open sliver — the CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attribute + golden-fixture round-trip on the wire catalog — was explicitly re-scoped 2026-07-09 to ENG-1365 in the orvex-studio-contracts repo, out of scope for an orvex-wiki gap-hunt. 0 build gaps survive.

gaps.requirement: Decision-1 + Decision-2 + PO direction 1-2 (ENG-1599): Adopt the TS OpenTelemetry SDK in the engine — traces + metrics + log correlation with Fastify/HTTP/pg/Redis/Kafka auto-instrumentation behind the OrvexRootModule flag; W3C traceparent continuation/root-span start; pino stamps trace_id/span_id/correlation_id into EVERY log line; conform to obs/CONVENTIONS.md (FR-C18) layered on OTel semantic conventions, without importing pkg/obs or any AGPL-boundary code.
gaps.quote: Adopt the TS OpenTelemetry SDK in the engine (traces + metrics + log correlation) with Fastify/HTTP/pg/Redis/Kafka auto-instrumentation, behind the existing OrvexRootModule flag ... pino stamps trace_id / span_id / correlation_id into every log line so Loki logs join Tempo spans (the FR-CT2 pivot).
gaps.why_uncovered: No story in the wiki (engine) plan adopts an OTel tracing SDK or stamps pino with trace_id/span_id. grep of all wiki bodies for traceparent/OpenTelemetry SDK/OTel SDK/pino/trace_id returns nothing. E5-S3 (A-OBSERVE) only threads a plain correlation-id and adds an OTLP metric for relay lag; E9-S2 (A-OBSERVE) only does liveness/health echoes. ENG-1360 (M6) covers /metrics, not trace emission. This is a distinct BUILD leg (ENG-1599) with no home.
gaps.suggested_home: New story under wiki E9 (Cross-cell tenant-move contract & observability) or E5, e.g. '[wiki] Engine TS OpenTelemetry tracing SDK — traceparent continuation + pino trace_id/span_id/correlation_id log stamping under OrvexRootModule flag, FR-C18-conformant, no pkg/obs import' (ENG-1599).
gaps.verdict: REFUTED — not a wiki-plan story gap, but not a build gap either: ENG-1599 ('Engine OTel tracing emission + W3C trace-context propagation') is status=Done in Linear (completed 2026-07-09, PR #68 + 3 follow-up fix commits merged to origin/main). Code is live: apps/server/src/orvex/obs/{orvex-tracing.bootstrap.ts, orvex-tracing.module.ts, orvex-correlation.hook.ts, orvex-span-attributes.util.ts, orvex-kysely-span.plugin.ts} implements the OTel SDK, Fastify/HTTP/ioredis/kysely-Postgres instrumentation, W3C traceparent continuation, and pino trace_id/span_id/correlation_id stamping (verified via git log + git ls-tree on origin/main). The gap-hunt's grep of wiki plan.json/feature-map.txt missed this because the work shipped as a direct Linear issue outside the P1-structure epic/story breakdown, not because it is unbuilt.

gaps.requirement: Decision-3 + Decision-4 emit-side (ENG-1600): Persist trace context across the outbox seam — orvex_outbox carries traceparent, tracestate, correlation_id columns; the api stamps live context at write time; the worker relay restores it at drain time, emits a producer span, and writes traceparent/tracestate as CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attributes on the cell/ envelope, proven against contracts golden fixtures so consumers can LINK.
gaps.quote: orvex_outbox carries traceparent, tracestate, correlation_id columns ... the worker relay restores it at drain time, emits a producer span, and writes traceparent/tracestate as CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attributes on the cell/ envelope ... the tracing extension is part of the emitted CloudEvent contract, not incidental.
gaps.why_uncovered: E5-S3 is the closest story but its DoD test (TestProducedEventCarriesOrvexcellAndCorrelation) and ACs assert only the orvexcell attr and a plain correlation-id 'standard attribute' end-to-end — it does NOT add traceparent/tracestate outbox columns, does NOT emit a producer span, and does NOT write the CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attributes. The ADR flags this as a contract change that must be built into M6 now (ENG-1600), separate from the correlation-id. Uncovered.
gaps.suggested_home: Extend wiki E5-S3, or add a sibling story '[wiki] Outbox trace-context carry — traceparent/tracestate columns + api stamp + relay producer span + CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension on the cell/ envelope, golden-fixtured' (ENG-1600).
gaps.verdict: REFUTED — ENG-1600 ('Trace-context across the outbox→CloudEvent→Kafka seam') is status=Done in Linear (completed 2026-07-09, PR #76 merged to origin/main, commits a18aa7db + 618b5ab3). git grep on origin/main confirms orvex_outbox traceparent/tracestate/correlation_id columns, an in-txn api stamp (orvex-outbox-trace-context.util.ts), and relay restore + PRODUCER span emission (outbox-atomicity-and-relay.integration.spec.ts AC1/AC2). The one honestly-still-open sliver — the CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attribute + golden-fixture round-trip on the wire catalog — was explicitly re-scoped 2026-07-09 to ENG-1365 in the orvex-studio-contracts repo (a different repo/pack), which is out of scope for an orvex-wiki gap-hunt, not an uncovered orvex-wiki build item. Not a plan.json story, but not unbuilt.

gaps.requirement: Decision-5 (NFR-CT2/CT5): PII redaction is load-bearing — no page titles/bodies/user PII in span names or attributes; tenant/workspace render as identity's opaque id; orvex-mask.util.ts governs attribute values; enforced as a determinism/contract gate (deny-list of PII attribute keys) + a review lens.
gaps.quote: No page titles/bodies/user PII in span names or attributes; tenant/workspace render as identity's opaque id (NFR-CT5); orvex-mask.util.ts governs attribute values ... Enforced as a determinism/contract gate (a deny-list of PII attribute keys) + a review lens.
gaps.why_uncovered: No story or artifact in the wiki plan implements orvex-mask.util.ts, the PII attribute-key deny-list, or the contract/determinism gate over emitted spans. grep for orvex-mask across all wiki bodies returns nothing. This is a hard requirement gating the engine's most-privileged read surface (the console's standing LGTM credential) and has no home.
gaps.suggested_home: Fold into the Gap-1 tracing story or add '[wiki] Span-attribute PII redaction — orvex-mask.util.ts deny-list + determinism/contract gate (no titles/bodies/PII; tenant as opaque id)' under wiki E9.
gaps.verdict: REFUTED — landed as part of ENG-1599 (Done, merged) rather than as a separate wiki-plan story. AC6 of ENG-1599 is the named PII deny-list gate ('the span-attribute builder passes values through orvex-mask.util.ts ... tenant/workspace = opaque workspaceId'), and origin/main confirms both apps/server/src/orvex/attachments/orvex-mask.util.ts (pre-existing util, reused) and the dedicated apps/server/src/orvex/obs/orvex-span-redaction.processor.ts (+ .spec.ts). The grep for 'orvex-mask' in wiki plan bodies found nothing because this shipped as engine code under a direct Linear issue, not as a plan.json story — it is not an uncovered requirement.

components.name: TS OpenTelemetry SDK integration in the engine (OrvexRootModule-flag-guarded, Fastify/HTTP/pg/Redis/Kafka auto-instrumentation, OTLP endpoint via config/ env seam)
components.quote: Adopt the TS OpenTelemetry SDK in the engine (traces + metrics + log correlation) ... behind the existing OrvexRootModule flag (flag off = byte-for-byte vanilla boot ...). The OTLP endpoint is env-only via the config/ seam (OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT ...).

components.name: orvex_outbox traceparent / tracestate / correlation_id columns
components.quote: orvex_outbox carries traceparent, tracestate, correlation_id columns (genuinely-needed fields ...). The api stamps the live context into the row at write time; the worker relay restores it at drain time.

components.name: CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attributes (traceparent/tracestate) on the cell/ envelope
components.quote: writes traceparent/tracestate as CloudEvent Distributed-Tracing extension attributes on the cell/ envelope, alongside the A-OBSERVE correlation attribute.

components.name: orvex-mask.util.ts (span-attribute PII redaction / deny-list util)
components.quote: orvex-mask.util.ts governs attribute values. This is a hard requirement ... Enforced as a determinism/contract gate (a deny-list of PII attribute keys) + a review lens.
